description: Use this API to enable or disable the simulation option setting for dynamic model debug output. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.12.0 and 34.5.0. ierr = set_model_debug_output_flag(status) ierr, status = set_model_debug_output_flag()

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Option setting. (input; if Batch command or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if ICODE is 0; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
